ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution, Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-02-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Additional $358,000 Bond.
Off Calendar Mar-10-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated April 22, 1975 is admitted to probate. Kenneth L. Schwartz is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $325,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for June 2, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
